title: Samurai Pirate
writer: Takeshi Kimura, Shin'ichi Sekizawa, Toshio Yasumi
actors: Toshirô Mifune, Tadao Nakamaru, Mie Hama
plot: Sukezaemon, a pirate, is shipwrecked in a strange corner of the world. With his companion, a wizard named Sennin, Sukezaemon becomes entangled in a plot by the evil premier to succeed the dying King Raksha.
